block.text: You are inside the Administrative Building. Everyone is asleep, Of course. You see nothing Of special interest. What will you do now: Look for a specific object? Turn to 17 Search the whole Office thoroughly? Turn to 96 Investigate the other building? Turn to 171 Get in your robot and cross the electro-fence? Turn to 129 Leave the Dinosaur Preserve? Turn to 150

choice.text: Get in your robot and cross the electro-fence?
